name: Cogobuy Group
summary: Cogobuy Group operates as an e-commerce company serving the electronics manufacturing industry in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It sells integrated circuits and other electronic components comprising microcontrollers/processors, sensors and converters, signal and interface products, amplifiers, filters, optoelectronic devices, resistors, inductors, discrete devices, connectors, switches, relays, circuit protection devices, development tools and systems, multimedia ICs, and dedicated and motor control ICs, as well as FPGA/CPLD, DSP, memory, wireless and RF, power management, capacitance, timer, and clock products. The company offers its products through its e-commerce platform, cogobuy.com, which includes a direct sales platform, as well as through an online marketplace, and a team of technical consultants and professional sales representatives. It also provides media communication and collaboration platforms and solutions; supply chain financing services; and develops e-commerce software technology. In addition, the company develops and sells electronic communication products; operates the INGDAN.com platform; and holds Internet content provider license. It serves electronics manufacturers, including small and medium enterprise, and blue-chip customers. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China. Cogobuy Group is a subsidiary of Envision Global Investments Limited.
